## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Code quality
- [ ] CI / Build / Dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's code style (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Type annotations are complete (`mypy src/radio_ripper/` passes)
- [ ] Tests cover the new/changed functionality
- [ ] Coverage does not decrease below 80%
- [ ] Documentation (README, arc42) is updated if needed
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes
- [ ] Changelog entry added (if user-facing change)
